title: Coverage missing lines that were definitely hit

features.name: enum typedef FSM with combinational next-state logic
features.description: Code should include a FSM using typedef enum state type with a combinational always block that computes next state based on current state and inputs

features.name: coverage_line on combinational always with no side effects
features.description: Code should include coverage line instrumentation enabled on a combinational always block that has no I/O side effects and only computes internal state
features.snippet: always@(ST_cr or IN) begin temp_next = 1'b1; case(ST_cr) s0:begin if(IN==0) ST_nt = s0; else ST_nt = s1; end endcase end

features.name: display_in_combinational_block_enables_coverage
features.description: Code should include a display statement added inside a combinational always block to work around coverage instrumentation bug
features.snippet: always@(ST_cr or IN) begin $display("test"); temp_next = 1'b1; case(ST_cr) s0:begin if(IN==0) ST_nt = s0; else ST_nt = s1; end endcase end
